channel.title: RLHF on Xieydd's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in RLHF on Xieydd's Blog

item.title: One-Minute RL 101: Concepts and Framework Overview for Agent RL
item.author: xieydd@gmail.com (xieydd)
item.description: Why Get Started with RL Now Inspired by this article from Gao Ce, I've been wanting to dive deeper into Agent RL, understand the current progress of Agent RL infrastructure, and get hands-on with a full training experiment. After DeepSeek R1, everyone now sees that reinforcement learning can really improve reasoning ability in LLMs. As someone who works with AI infrastructure every day, I naturally wanted to try it myself.
